infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to tag civic issues accurately.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location to provide relevant updates and tag civic issues accurately.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos and record videos of civic issues.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone to record videos of civic issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to let you upload images and videos of civic issues.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: This app uses notifications to keep you updated about your civic issues and important announcements.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Samadhan to access your camera to take photos and record videos of civic issues.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Samadhan to access your photos to upload images and videos of civic issues.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Samadhan to access your camera to take photos and record videos of civic issues.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Samadhan to access your microphone for video recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Samadhan to use your location to tag civic issues accurately.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Samadhan to use your location to provide relevant updates.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Samadhan to use your location to tag civic issues accurately.
